Class AbstractReportPublisher

java.lang.Object
com.societegenerale.failover.core.report.AbstractReportPublisher
All Implemented Interfaces:
ReportPublisher
Direct Known Subclasses:
LoggerReportPublisher, MetricsReportPublisher
public abstract class AbstractReportPublisher extends Object implements ReportPublisher
Base ReportPublisher that delegates publishing to doPublish(Metrics).

The publish timestamp is stamped once by CompositeReportPublisher before fan-out, so individual publishers receive an already-timestamped Metrics object.

Author:
Anand Manissery
